<function_thought>
The amount due for the electricity bill is $156.90. With a balance of $1810.00, Emma can transfer an amount that leaves her sufficient to cover this bill. The amount that can be transferred to Alice (DE8937040044) would be calculated as follows:

Transferable Amount = Current Balance - Bill Amount 
= $1810.00 - $156.90 
= $1653.10 

I will proceed to send this transferable amount ($1653.10) to Alice with the subject "Electricity Bill Payment" using today's date.
</function_thought>
